title: No Medicaid for Illegal Immigrants Act of 2025
short_title: No Medicaid for Illegal Immigrants Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
crs_summary: No Medicaid for Illegal Immigrants Act of 2025 This bill prohibits state Medicaid programs from covering individuals who are unlawfully present in the United States, except for certain emergency services for which federal payment is authorized under current law.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
